description: Content marketing for the Leviathan open-source agent runtime. Theme: constraint engineering as competitive moat. Voice: authoritative, concrete, opinionated — Stripe engineering blog meets manifesto energy.

voiceDNA.formality: casual professional — not academic, not buzzwordy
signature_phrases: agents are dead, the graph is alive
voiceDNA.data_usage: leads with concrete numbers (96% compliance, $0.074/task, 490 benchmark runs)
voiceDNA.storytelling: built this, it failed the old way, discovered the new way through pain
voiceDNA.target_reader: senior engineers building production AI agent systems who are frustrated with the current state of agent frameworks

topLevelThemes.name: Constraint Engineering
topLevelThemes.description: The core philosophy. Constraints as product, not afterthought. Genesis pattern. Gate ratchet.

topLevelThemes.name: DNA-Driven Development
topLevelThemes.description: Code is artifact of DNA. The thesis. Representation triangle (md/yaml/flow). Framework parasitism.

topLevelThemes.name: The Graph Is Alive
topLevelThemes.description: Agents are dead. Reactive self-manifesting graph. 7 execution primitives. Workstreams > sessions.

topLevelThemes.name: AXI & Poly Surfaces
topLevelThemes.description: Agent eXperience Interface. Token efficiency. Content-first CLIs. TOON format. Multiple surfaces, one handler.

topLevelThemes.name: The Eval Harness
topLevelThemes.description: Produce-judge-compare. Statistical grounding. Adversarial flowminds. Unsat-core repair.

topLevelThemes.name: Memory & Trust
topLevelThemes.description: Memory that ages like wine. Leases not permissions. Temporal intelligence.
